ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the trading session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the trading session */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the session */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends issued on the day */,
  "stock_splits" REAL /* Stock splits that occurred on the day */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset for which the price is recorded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the trading occurred */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the asset on the given date */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the asset */,
  "trading_value" REAL /* Total trading value (volume * close_price) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time of the data entry for high-frequency trading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., Stock, Bond) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Primary exchange where the asset is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the asset belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the asset belongs */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the asset is registered */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the asset */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) number of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index at the start */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the index is measured */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the index */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update time of the index value */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the index value compared to the previous day */,
  "year_high" REAL /* Highest value of the index in the current year */,
  "year_low" REAL /* Lowest value of the index in the current year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst in the firm */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the analyst */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the analyst belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the analyst was hired */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the analyst */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the target record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset for which the target is set */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price for the asset */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the asset */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Date by which the target price is expected to be reached */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of achieving the target price */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst who set the target */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Specific resource or data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)
